description: League configuration template for standardizing livery looks across a sim-racing league. Fill in the fields, save, and distribute to drivers along with the league's shared decal pack.

required_zones.name: League Logo Windshield Banner
required_zones.description: The league logo must appear on the windshield banner zone across the top of the windshield.

required_zones.name: League Contingency B-Pillar
required_zones.description: League contingency stack on both B-pillars, sized to regulation.

required_zones.name: Primary Sponsor Door
required_zones.description: Primary sponsor lockup on both doors. Driver-chosen sponsor, subject to approval.

required_zones.name: Series Title Sponsor Roof Stripe
required_zones.description: Series title-sponsor wordmark running along the roof centerline.

color_palette.name: racing_classic
color_palette.description: Clean classic racing palette — saturated primary colors, no neons, no pastels.

contingency_stack.notes: Contingency stack is supplied pre-built. Do not edit. Drop onto B-pillar zone as-is.

submission.late_submission_penalty: Driver uses previous week's approved livery.

penalties_for_non_compliance.penalty: Livery rejected; driver uses previous approved livery or default plain base.
Warning first offense, rejection on second.
Automatic rejection; reset stack from supplied file.

template_liveries_provided.name: League Template A — Clean Stripe
template_liveries_provided.description: Base white body with league-color centerline stripe. Drop in sponsors.

template_liveries_provided.name: League Template B — Split Halves
template_liveries_provided.description: Two-color split down the centerline. Driver chooses the two colors from palette.

template_liveries_provided.name: League Template C — Minimalist
template_liveries_provided.description: Solid body color with a single contrast accent stripe.

notes_for_admins: Replace all 'example' strings with your league's real values. Distribute this file along with the required asset files in the assets/ folder. Drivers import this config into SPB (File menu → Import League Config) and SPB will enforce required zones, warn on banned bases/patterns, and provide the supplied template liveries as starting points.
